goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should 'leave after 10:15' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
The train should leave after 10:15 and should leave on tuesday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
